title: Ancient Earth (Fossils and Archeology: Revival Addon)
description: Take a step from the present to the past...
body:
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ancient-earth)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-earth)
## Overview
**Ancient Earth** is an addon for the Fossils and Archeology: Revival Mod, that allows the creatures from the Mod to naturally spawn throughout the world (this Mod does not add any new creatures, blocks, biomes, etc.).

## Spawn Values
- You can change the spawn data through the usage of a datapack should you wish to.

## Important
- The data for spawns was derivived from the Prehistoric Spawns Mod, all credits to the Author (JayZX535) for that internal data and for allowing its usage under the MIT licence.
